name: Kensington
heroAlt: Compact kitchen and storage joinery reference suited to Kensington terrace homes and apartments
metaTitle: Custom Joinery & Renovations Kensington | InsideOut Joinery & Renos
metaDescription: Kensington custom joinery and renovation services for terraces, apartments and family homes. Kitchens, wardrobes and storage. Free quotes. Call InsideOut Joinery today.
intro: Kensington is a suburb where terrace homes, older apartment blocks and student share-houses sit alongside well-maintained family properties close to UNSW and the Prince of Wales Hospital. The joinery needs here vary a lot depending on the property — but the common thread is usually a home that needs to function harder without losing its character.
localContext: A well-planned kitchen layout, properly built wardrobes or a concealed laundry can make a real difference in a Kensington terrace or apartment. The goal is joinery that earns its space rather than just filling it.
projectReferenceNote: The Darlinghurst fitout demonstrates the kind of tight, considered joinery that translates well to Kensington terraces and apartments — where footprint is fixed and every design decision has to justify itself.
whyChoose: Experience with terrace homes and compact apartments that need smart storage
Kitchen and wardrobe joinery built to suit older home proportions
Concealed laundry and utility storage to help homes stay flexible
Straightforward quoting process with no unnecessary upselling

faqs.question: Do you work on terrace homes in Kensington?
faqs.answer: Yes. Terraces are a regular part of our work across the Eastern Suburbs. We understand the storage constraints and layout challenges that come with them.

faqs.question: Can you quote a single room rather than a full renovation?
faqs.answer: Yes. We take on single-room scopes including kitchens, wardrobes and bathroom vanities, as well as broader multi-room fitouts.

faqs.question: Do you work in rental investment properties as well as owner-occupied homes?
faqs.answer: Yes. We can tailor the brief and materials to suit investment property budgets or owner-occupier finishes.

faqs.question: How long does a kitchen renovation typically take?
faqs.answer: Most kitchen renovations are completed within two to three weeks once the scope and materials are confirmed. We can give a more specific timeline once we have reviewed your brief.

ctaText: If your Kensington home needs a kitchen renovation, new wardrobes or smarter joinery, send through your brief and we can help shape the right approach.
